sections.title: Credentials not used in any workflow
sections.description: This credential is not used in any workflow. Keeping unused credentials in your instance is an unneeded security risk.
sections.recommendation: Consider deleting these credentials if you no longer need them.

sections.title: Credentials not used in any active workflow
sections.description: This credential is not used in active workflows. Keeping unused credentials in your instance is an unneeded security risk.
sections.recommendation: Consider deleting these credentials if you no longer need them.

sections.title: Credentials not used in recently executed workflows
sections.description: This credential is not used in recently executed workflows, i.e. workflows executed in the past 90 days. Keeping unused credentials in your instance is an unneeded security risk.
sections.recommendation: Consider deleting these credentials if you no longer need them.

sections.title: Outdated instance
sections.description: This n8n instance is outdated. Currently at version 2.30.8, missing 1 update.
sections.recommendation: Consider updating this n8n instance to the latest version to prevent security vulnerabilities.

sections.title: Security settings
sections.description: This n8n instance has the following security settings.
sections.recommendation: Consider adjusting the security settings for your n8n instance based on your needs. See: https://docs.n8n.io/hosting/configuration/environment-variables/
